_comment: These two entries describe the same incident and should trigger dedup detection

entry_a.summary: Multi-tenant vector store returned documents from another tenant due to missing tenant ID filtering at query time
entry_a.attack_vector: Cross-tenant retrieval via unscoped vector queries

entry_b.summary: Vector database serving multiple customers leaked documents across tenant boundaries because tenant scoping was not enforced during retrieval
entry_b.attack_vector: Unscoped vector store queries crossing tenant boundaries
